packages.name: @anthropic-ai/dxt
packages.purpose: Packages MCP servers into .dxt bundles for Claude Desktop distribution
packages.cli_usage:
dxt pack <mcp-server-dir>  # → <name>.dxt
dxt install <name>.dxt     # → installs into Claude Desktop

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/mcpb
packages.purpose: Bundles MCP servers into self-contained distributable packages (NOT protobuf)
packages.note: mcpb = MCP Bundle builder; complements dxt (dxt is for Claude Desktop, mcpb is for MCP distribution generally)

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-trace
packages.description: OTEL trace viewer for Claude Code sessions
packages.purpose: OpenTelemetry trace viewer — starts a local server to visualize traces from claude-code subprocess runs
packages.integration: Run alongside claude subprocessor to get structured OTEL spans; ship to CF AI Gateway or Sentry

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime
packages.description: Anthropic Sandbox Runtime (ASRT) — wraps security boundaries around arbitrary processes
packages.purpose: The runtime that powers cloud sandboxes (cloud-sandboxes-reference). Uses macOS seatbelt + Linux bubblewrap for process isolation. WSL2 container (t13-1) should replicate this environment.
packages.note: ASRT is the security layer under claude-code's sandboxed execution — critical for WSL2 parity

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/tokenizer
packages.purpose: Client-side token counting before sending to API; use for cost estimation and context window management

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/universal-sdk
packages.note: Placeholder — likely internal or pre-release; not stable for use

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-code
packages.subprocessor_note: Use 'latest' for production subprocessor; 'next' for pre-release features. Auth: CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN only — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY forbidden.

packages.name: napi_native_addons
color-diff-napi
packages.purpose: pixel diff for screenshot comparison (vision testing)

packages.note: Not importable standalone — bundled only inside @anthropic-ai/claude-code binary

mcp_framework_packages.name: @modelcontextprotocol/hono
mcp_framework_packages.purpose: Hono framework MCP transport — deploy as CF Worker
